hero.h1:
Tattoo Artist Munich
one story at a time
hero.dedicated: Tattoo artist Munich — dedicated to preserving the Japanese tattoo tradition, one story at a time

journey.heading: The path: etched in discipline
journey.p1: For over five years I have dedicated myself as a tattoo artist in Munich to the Japanese tattoo tradition. My journey began with deep respect for the legacy of Irezumi — not as a trend, but as a commitment to a powerful, living art form.
journey.p2: As a tattooist in Munich I specialise in large-scale, complex work: full backpieces, sleeves and bodysuits. These projects require an exceptional degree of discipline and patience — qualities I bring to every single line.

philosophy.heading: The philosophy — love and devotion
philosophy.body: At KishaTattoo Munich we are guided by deep love for the craft and sincere dedication to your vision

mastery.heading: The commitment of the best tattooist in Munich
mastery.sub: Traditional Irezumi is an act of endurance — it demands patience from tattooist and client alike

steps.title: For the tattooist
steps.body: It requires focused discipline to master the technique, respect the anatomy of the body and dedicate countless hours to perfection.

steps.title: For the client
steps.body: The courage and patience to commit to a long process involving multiple sessions — knowing that the finished masterpiece will be a lasting testament to your inner strength.

steps.title: My dedication
steps.body: Goes to those who seek an authentic, meaningful and enduring work of art. As a tattoo artist in Munich I am here to guide the process and ensure that your legacy is beautifully etched into skin.

awards.heading: Awarded at the Munich Tattoo Convention

cta.heading: Ready for your tattoo with Kisha in Munich?

meta.title: Book Appointment — Kisha Tattoo Munich
meta.description: Request an appointment at Kisha Tattoo — Japanese Irezumi, graphic and fine line in Munich. Reply within 48 hours.

form.filesHint: *Send reference images and inspiration — the more context, the better the custom design
form.success: Thank you — your vision has been received. Kisha will review it and get back to you within 48 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

list.title: Send request
list.body: Fill in the form — describe your idea, the desired motif, style and placement. Attach reference images if you have them.

list.title: Consultation
list.body: Kisha will get back to you within 48 hours. Together we discuss your project, feasibility and approximate time required.

list.title: Design & appointment
list.body: After the deposit the custom design is created. The final appointment is set together — the first session starts with the stencil check.
